nasb.text: Let not the swift man flee, Nor the mighty man escape; In the north beside the river Euphrates They have stumbled and fallen.

esv.text: “The swift cannot flee away, nor the warrior escape; in the north by the river Euphrates they have stumbled and fallen.

cnv.text: “快跑的跑不掉， 勇士也不能逃脫； 他們在北方、在幼發拉底河邊， 都絆跌仆倒。

ccb.text: 善跑者跑不掉， 强壮者逃不了， 他们扑倒在北面的幼发拉底河边。
